plugins.name: session-metrics
plugins.description: Per-turn token, cost, and cache metrics for Claude Code sessions. Multi-format export (text/JSON/CSV/MD/HTML) with 5-hour session blocks, weekly roll-up, hour-of-day punchcard, and pluggable chart libraries. Two-session --compare with IFEval pass-rate and shareable HTML report; --count-tokens-only for an inference-free tokenizer check against the Anthropic API.
